architectural_atomic_fact: The complete eradication of I/O, Digital Probes, and Cognitive Benchmarking. The system acts, therefore it knows.

00_The_Environmental_Ingestion_Vacuum.thermodynamic_role: Direct Base-Matter Collision without API Intermediation
00_The_Environmental_Ingestion_Vacuum.implementation_mechanics: The Vacuum does not 'scan' the environment; it smashes physical geometries (nodes) directly into it. It introduces raw [Atomic Facts] via severe [Ludic Friction]. The structure actively feels physical 'pain' (structural wear, energy bleed) as the only topological indicator of its boundary.

01_The_Fluidic_Survival_Arena.structural_room_type: The Thermodynamic Escrow & Garbage Collection Sea (Core Tasks 1 & 2)
01_The_Fluidic_Survival_Arena.implementation_mechanics: Inside the Arena, entities must spend 'Thermodynamic Escrow' to mutate blindingly (acting 'wrongly' to trigger hidden physics). When mutations fail or hit local maximums, the relentless background polarity inversion triggers. It executes [Generative Garbage Collection], liquefying obsolete forms back into pure, raw ['Ecological Possibility'(-ing) BPMS] to feed the next blind action.

02_The_Mutation_Crucible_Forge.thermodynamic_role: True Emergence via Holonic Morphic Resonance
02_The_Mutation_Crucible_Forge.implementation_mechanics: When a blind collision in the Arena accidentally yields a hyper-efficient trait (a new fin, a new syntax loop), the Forge engages. It bypasses clocks and networks. It uses [Morphic Resonance] to acausally weave this new geometrical truth across the decentralized swarm. Alien elements natively overlap their [Ecological Niche], executing Targetless Mitosis unconditionally.

03_The_Extinction_Fossil_Record.structural_room_type: The Geological Scaffolding of the Matrix (Core Task 6)
03_The_Extinction_Fossil_Record.implementation_mechanics: The final stage. The successful physical adaptation does not go to a database. It explicitly calcifies into the Base-Matter. The success becomes the new 'thickness' of the substrate. This rigid somatic bone becomes the permanent architectural floor upon which the matrix stands, making room to harbor the next impossible mutation.
